retrieved_result: How long does THC from marijuana stay in your system? Science & Mathematics Botany How long does THC from marijuana stay in your system? I am wondering how long THC from weed stays in your system and can be traced? Follow 4 answers Answers Relevance Rating Newest Oldest Best Answer: 'Marijuana is detectable in urine for 48-72 hours after single use.'
